response.justification: Strong individual contributor with 15+ years across full-stack, embedded, and developer tooling, plus genuine experience building test frameworks (Trial, Fluent-Asserts), CI/CD infrastructure, and MCP code generators relevant to developer productivity. However, the resume shows no formal people-management track record — no listed direct reports, performance review responsibilities, or team-lead roles — which is the core requirement for this Level II Manager position. Mobile-platform exposure is limited and dated (iOS/Apple TV circa 2015-2016). Worth a screening conversation only to verify any unstated management experience; otherwise this profile fits a Staff IC role better than an EM role.
strengths: Deep developer-tools background: custom test runner, assertion library, CI/CD setup, MCP tooling
15+ years of polyglot engineering across web, embedded, and high-throughput backends
Demonstrated teaching/mentoring via workshops, courses, and conference talks
concerns: No explicit people-management experience or direct reports in any listed role
Mobile-platform experience is minimal and ~10 years old (brief iOS/Apple TV stint)
No evidence of leading organizational change or owning roadmaps for a managed team
